keyPoints: Use Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) or Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks for time series forecasting
Include input features such as historical values, seasonality, and trends
Use techniques like normalization, feature scaling, and data augmentation to prepare data
Split data into training and testing sets, train on training set, and evaluate on testing set
Experiment with different architectures, optimizers, and hyperparameters to improve performance
Monitor performance metrics such as mean absolute error (MAE) and mean squared error (MSE)
